arts.sum: Liverpool can be crowned Premier League champions on Sunday following their game with Leicester - but they first need the result to go their way when Arsenal face Ipswich

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal travel to face Ipswich Town at Portman Road in the Premier League this afternoon. In what could be a conclusive fixture for both teams, Arsenal will want to delay Liverpool’s title celebrations for another week at least. The Gunners return to action after the high of beating Real Madrid in midweek. A 2-1 win […] The post Arsenal XI vs Ipswich – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.

arts.ttl: Partey replaced, Enrique dilemma, yellow cards - Arsenal and PSG dream XIs after suspension blows - football.london
arts.sum: Many have backed PSG and Luis Enrique after they knocked out Liverpool but Arsenal have become unignorable after their dominant 5-1 aggregate win over Real Madrid. With that in mind, Mikel Arteta knows that UEFA suspension rules have left him without Thomas Partey for the first leg.

arts.ttl: Football news: Arsenal striker boost as Bournemouth star's price tag revealed
arts.sum: A number of Premier League clubs including Manchester United, Arsenal and Liverpool are interested in adding to their attacks this summer with Antoine Semenyo and Viktor Gyokeres among those who could be on the move

arts.ttl: What Real Madrid have now done in talks to sign Zubimendi as Berta thinks he'll sign for Arsenal - journalist
Three ways Arsenal can line-up without Thomas Partey vs PSG
arts.sum: Possible XI: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Odegaard, Jorginho, Rice; Saka, Merino, Martinelli. With injuries across the squad - but mainly in defence and attack - the midfield has become a pillar for Arsenal's chances in the Champions League.
